title: Transport Abstraction
content: Abstract HTTP client interface. Architecture-only — no implementation.

title: Timeout Policy
content: Connect timeout: 5s. Read timeout: 10s. Total timeout: 30s.

title: Retry Policy
content: Exponential backoff: 1s, 2s, 4s, 8s. Max 4 retries. Only on 5xx and timeout.

title: Rate Limit Policy
content: Per-endpoint rate limits. Order: 10/s. Cancel: 10/s. General: 1200/min. Backoff on 429.

title: Circuit Breaker Policy
content: Open after 5 consecutive failures. Half-open after 30s. Closed after 3 successes.

title: Idempotency Key Policy
content: UUID v4 idempotency key per order request. Server-side dedup recommended.

title: Response Validation
content: Validate HTTP status, content-type, JSON schema. Reject malformed responses.

title: Malformed Response Handling
content: Log error, reject response, increment error counter. No retry on malformed.

title: Partial Response Handling
content: Detect partial JSON, log error, reject. No partial processing.

title: Duplicate Response Handling
content: Idempotency key dedup. Log warning on duplicate detection.

title: Out-of-Order Response Handling
content: Sequence number tracking. Reject out-of-order. Log warning.

title: Stale Response Handling
content: Timestamp comparison. Reject responses older than 30s. Log warning.

title: Audit Event Emission
content: Every request/response logged: method, path, status, latency, error. Tamper-evident.

title: Kill Switch Dependency
content: Kill switch blocks all outbound requests when armed. Not implemented.
